description: Execute a plan until it is complete

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` first and treat it as the sole source of review scope for this flow. Determine the active `plan_path` and any `additional_repositories` in scope from that handoff file. If the handoff does not explicitly identify any additional repositories, treat that as none. The current repository is the canonical plan host and is implicitly in scope. If it also appears inside `additional_repositories`, treat that as redundant and ignore that entry. Verify that the selected plan exists in the current repository, that the selected plan filename carries the story number that matches the current repository branch, and that each participating additional repository is on a branch whose story number matches the selected plan filename. If those checks fail, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Do NOT use code_info tools for plan selection. Confirm what story the normalized review scope represents, list the participating repositories when there is more than one, and provide me with an overview of what is still remaining to be done without making file changes at this time.

Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` first and use only the stored `plan_path` and `additional_repositories` as the active scope for this flow. If possible, git push the story branch in the current repository and in every repository listed in `additional_repositories`.
